name: cpig-booleans-04-union-sphere-gyroid
description: Phase D4 boolean audit (B0) — CROSS-REP STRESS CASE (tape sphere + structural-clipped gyroid). Union of a tape sphere with a CPigGyroid (structural TPMS clipped to a box). Both operands are LIBFIVE -> Union stays structural per research §1.2 (LIBFIVE × LIBFIVE -> LIBFIVE). Expected: the gyroid lattice with an extra sphere bulge added on one side. Failure modes: scale mismatch (one operand rendered at very different size), AABB scoped to one operand (the other clipped at the boundary), sign-related artifacts.

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D ray-marched signed-distance surface combining a gyroid lattice (interconnected saddle surfaces forming a periodic lattice) with an additional bulging sphere shape merged on one side. NOT a smooth sphere alone, NOT a pure gyroid alone, NOT a blank viewport.

checkpoints.name: cpig-booleans-union-sphere-gyroid
checkpoints.description: Union(gyroid_lattice([-25,25]^3, period=20), sphere(30,0,0;r=12)) — a gyroid with a sphere bulge attached on +x. Both should render at correct scale.
